research_question: Test whether removing the low-volatility component from the weak v2 challenger improves low-liquidity dependence and fixed-test stability while keeping reversal and momentum unchanged.
result_interpretation_rule: Exploratory challenger round: compare fixed-test audit outputs against the v2 weak scheme without making a promotion claim.
time_partition_plan: Reuse the current fullchain exploratory snapshot and project panels; no validation-budget consumption claimed.
notes: This challenger changes exactly one core dimension: remove volatility_20d_raw from the v2 score composition.
TopK, entry_tradeable timing, execution semantics, benchmark choice, and cost parameters must remain unchanged.
The chunk-size experiment is an engineering runtime parameter and must not change strategy outputs.
